mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO seat_order_info (user_id, seat_info_id, date, time_split, sign_in_time, order_status, create_time) VALUES
(#{seatOrderInfo.userId}, #{seatOrderInfo.seatInfoId}, #{seatOrderInfo.date}, #{seatOrderInfo.timeSplit}, #{seatOrderInfo.signInTime}, #{seatOrderInfo.orderStatus}, #{seatOrderInfo.createTime})
mapper.update:
UPDATE seat_order_info
sign_in_time = #{signInTime},
order_status = #{orderStatus},
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM seat_order_info WHERE id IN
#{id}
